title: GraviFlyFix
description: Fix GraviChestPlate can't fly, can't protect from radiation and being weaker in generic damage protection even than nano suite
body:
Fix GraviChestPlate can't fly, can't protect from radiation and being weaker in generic damage protection even than nano suite.

Dependencies:
- industrialcraft-2-2.8.222-ex112
- ic2patcher-2.0.9
- Gravitation Suite-3.1.1
- GraviSuite-Patcher-1.0.0

Source will be available later
